full_text:
Xiahou Cun
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiahou Cun. Advises Cao Ren to fortify banks against flood then fight tired Shu troops. Guan Yu kills him in one blow. Xiahou Cun may not have existed in history. Xiahou Cun was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Xiahou Cun lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
